topics.title: Prompt Engineering
topics.description: Core techniques for crafting effective prompts to steer Claude's behavior, including structuring, examples, and output control.

subtopics.title: Prompt Fundamentals
subtopics.description: Basic principles of prompt design including clarity, context, and specificity.

subtopics.title: Clarity and XML Structuring
subtopics.description: Writing clear, direct prompts and using XML tags to organize instructions, context, and examples unambiguously.

subtopics.title: Role Prompting and System Prompts
subtopics.description: Setting roles in system prompts to focus Claude's behavior and tone for specific use cases.

subtopics.title: Few-Shot and Multishot Prompting
subtopics.description: Using relevant, diverse examples wrapped in proper tags to steer output format, tone, and structure.

subtopics.title: Output Control and Formatting
subtopics.description: Techniques for controlling response format, verbosity, and style.

subtopics.title: Structured Outputs and JSON
subtopics.description: Guaranteeing schema conformance with JSON outputs and strict tool use for validated responses.

subtopics.title: Verbosity and Communication Style
subtopics.description: Controlling response length, markdown usage, and communication tone through explicit instructions.

subtopics.title: Long Context Prompting
subtopics.description: Best practices for working with large documents and data-rich inputs over 20K tokens.

subtopics.title: Document Structuring and Placement
subtopics.description: Placing long documents at the top, structuring with XML tags, and grounding responses in quotes.

topics.title: Tool Use and Function Calling
topics.description: Enabling Claude to interact with external tools and functions through the Messages API.

subtopics.title: Tool Use Fundamentals
subtopics.description: Core concepts of defining tools, handling tool requests, and processing results.

subtopics.title: Tool Definitions and Input Schemas
subtopics.description: Defining tools with names, descriptions, and JSON Schema input schemas for the Messages API.

subtopics.title: Tool Results and Response Handling
subtopics.description: Executing tools, returning tool_result blocks, and processing Claude's final responses.

subtopics.title: Advanced Tool Patterns
subtopics.description: Parallel tool calls, sequential chaining, and tool_choice configuration.

subtopics.title: Parallel and Sequential Tool Calls
subtopics.description: Handling multiple independent tool calls in parallel vs. sequential chaining for dependent operations.

subtopics.title: Tool Choice Configuration
subtopics.description: Using tool_choice parameter (auto, any, tool, none) to control when Claude uses specific tools.

subtopics.title: Strict Tool Use
subtopics.description: Guaranteeing schema conformance with strict: true for production agents where invalid parameters cause failures.

subtopics.title: Server-Side Tools
subtopics.description: Built-in tools that execute on Anthropic's servers including web search, code execution, and memory.

subtopics.title: Web Search and Web Fetch Tools
subtopics.description: Using server-side web search and web fetch tools for real-time information retrieval.

subtopics.title: Code Execution Tool
subtopics.description: Running code in sandboxed environments for data analysis, calculations, and file processing.

subtopics.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
subtopics.description: Connecting Claude to external systems via the MCP standard for tools and data sources.

subtopics.title: MCP Connector and Tool Conversion
subtopics.description: Converting MCP tools to Claude format and connecting to MCP servers via the Messages API.

topics.title: Agentic Patterns
topics.description: Building autonomous AI agents with multi-step reasoning, tool orchestration, and state management.

subtopics.title: Extended and Adaptive Thinking
subtopics.description: Enhanced reasoning capabilities for complex tasks with step-by-step thought processes.

subtopics.title: Extended Thinking Basics
subtopics.description: Enabling thinking blocks with budget_tokens, streaming thinking, and processing thinking outputs.

subtopics.title: Adaptive Thinking and Effort Parameter
subtopics.description: Using adaptive thinking mode with effort parameter (low, medium, high, max) for dynamic reasoning depth.

subtopics.title: Interleaved Thinking with Tools
subtopics.description: Reasoning between tool calls to make sophisticated decisions based on intermediate results.

subtopics.title: Long-Horizon Reasoning
subtopics.description: State tracking and context management across extended autonomous sessions.

subtopics.title: State Management and Progress Tracking
subtopics.description: Using structured formats for state data, git for checkpoints, and unstructured text for progress notes.

subtopics.title: Multi-Context Window Workflows
subtopics.description: Managing tasks spanning multiple context windows with setup scripts, tests, and graceful continuation.

subtopics.title: Agent Orchestration
subtopics.description: Multi-agent coordination and subagent delegation patterns.

subtopics.title: Subagent Orchestration
subtopics.description: Delegating specialized subtasks to subagents and managing when to use parallel vs. direct approaches.

subtopics.title: Agent SDK
subtopics.description: Building production AI agents using Claude Code as a library with built-in tools.

subtopics.description: Using query function, built-in tools (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep), and permission modes.

subtopics.title: Hooks and Sessions
subtopics.description: Running custom code at lifecycle points (PreToolUse, PostToolUse) and maintaining context with sessions.

topics.title: Context Window Management
topics.description: Strategies for efficiently managing Claude's context window including caching, compaction, and token optimization.

subtopics.title: Prompt Caching
subtopics.description: Reducing costs and latency by caching frequently used prompt content.

subtopics.description: Using cache_control with ephemeral type, automatic caching, and 5-minute vs 1-hour cache durations.

subtopics.description: Understanding thinking block caching behavior, cache invalidation, and preservation patterns.

subtopics.title: Context Optimization
subtopics.description: Techniques for managing and reducing context window usage.

subtopics.description: Server-side context summarization for long-running conversations approaching window limits.

subtopics.title: Token Counting API
subtopics.description: Using the token counting endpoint to determine message size before sending and manage costs.

subtopics.description: Processing large volumes of requests asynchronously for cost savings.

subtopics.description: Creating batches, polling for results, and achieving 50% cost reduction on batch requests.

subtopics.description: Using official SDKs for Python, TypeScript, Java, and other languages.

subtopics.description: Installing SDKs, configuring API keys, and using type-safe request/response handling.

subtopics.description: Image understanding and analysis features.

subtopics.description: Passing images to Claude, multi-image contexts, and extracting structured data from visual content.

subtopics.description: Working with PDFs and other document formats.
